title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zepto South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zepto South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto South Asia Partners family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto South Asia Partners:
Zepto South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
